title: ToxCastLite: A portable semantic evidence graph linking in vitro bioactivity, in vivo toxicity, and exposure-use context
excerpt: A portable semantic evidence-access system linking ToxCast in vitro bioactivity, ToxRefDB in vivo toxicity evidence, and CPDat product-use context through assay-scoped SQLite stores, RDF projection, GraphDB querying, and schema-grounded natural-language-to-SPARQL workflows.
